code.invalid_api_key: The API key was rejected by the provider. Check your key in Settings → AI.
code.rate_limit: The provider rate limit was reached. Wait a moment and try again, or check your plan.
code.model_not_found: The selected model is not available. Pick another model in Settings → AI.
code.network: Could not reach the service. Check your internet connection and try again.
code.context_overflow: The conversation is too long for the model. Start a new chat or compact the thread.
code.unknown: Something went wrong. The technical detail is in the log.
